results.rendered_html: paryutsuka (pa˚ + u˚) adj. f. ā wehmüthig, von einem sehnsüchtigen Verlangen ergriffen, ein Verlangen empfindend nach (dat.): nijamahotsavadarśanāya  RATNĀV. 5,1 . ohne obj.  R. 2,65,27  (67,21 . GORR .). ayi saṃprati dehi darśanaṃ smara paryutsuka eṣa mādhavaḥ  KUMĀRAS. 4,28 .  ŚĀK. 99 , v. l.  VIKRAM. 34 .  MĀLAV. 23,23 . 30,6 . paryutsukībhū  ŚĀK. 99 . paryutsukatva n. nom. abstr.  RAGH. 5,67 .

results.rendered_html:
paryutsuka a.
1 Sorrowful, sorry, regretting, sad; ˚tvaṃ sorrow;  R. 5. 67 ; paryutsukībhavati yatsukhito'pi jaṃtuḥ  Ś. 5. 2. 
2 Eagerly desirous, anxious, anxiously longing for; smara paryusutka eṣa mādhavaḥ  Ku. 4. 28 ;  V. 2. 16. 
3 Agitated, excited; muhūrtaṃ paryutmukamanā āsīt  Ś. 6.
